notes: This list controls trust based on WHO deployed or owns a program
Programs with these owners/upgrade authorities are considered safe
Exercise extreme caution when adding addresses - compromised owner = compromised trust
Verify addresses through multiple sources before adding
Organizations section groups related deployer addresses
